title: Fast Slot
description: Changes Brewing Stand shift-click behavior for Blaze Powder to prioritize the ingredient slot.
body:
**FastSlot** is a small quality-of-life mod that changes the default behavior when shift-clicking Blaze Powder in the Brewing Stand.  
Instead of sending it to the fuel slot first, the mod prioritizes placing it into the ingredient slot.  
If the ingredient slot is full, the powder will be moved to the fuel slot as usual.

This mod is client and server friendly, requires NeoForge for Minecraft 1.21.1, and does not add any new items or blocks.
